title: Savory Velvety Norwegian Falafel Pilaf
description: A post-workout dish featuring savory falafel blended into a creamy pilaf with high-protein-friendly options and air-fried textures.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add garlic and sunflower seeds if using, sauté for about 2 minutes.
Add falafel balls to the pan, tossing them gently with the garlic mixture until they start to brown evenly. Remove from heat.
In a separate bowl, mix rice with vegetable broth and almond milk. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer until liquid is absorbed by the rice (about 10 minutes).
Blend falafel mixture in batches with remaining ingredients until smooth and creamy. Return to pan if desired for a more velvety texture.
Stir blended falafel into pilaf sauce, reheat gently on low heat without boiling again. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course over quinoa or another whole grain of your choice.
